2026 SMA20/120 Cross Ladder - Entry Situation Charts

Each chart shows close price, SMA20(blue), SMA120(gold), entry/exit markers, average price, filled ladder levels, and 6th-zone hard stop. Window: 36 bars before entry and at least 24 bars after exit.
